established the home health plan of care, may sign the plan of care or the recertification 
statement in the absence of the certifying physician or certifying allowed practitioner. 
This is only permitted when such physician or allowed non-physician practitioner has 
been authorized to care for the certifying physician’s or allowed practitioner’s patients in
